<!-- design-phase-complete-586 -->

Phase summary: routine disposition explains that no inherited citation-backed artifact is being used.

```yaml
finding_dispositions:
  schema_version: 1
  passes_run: [1]
  entries:
    - finding_id: F8
      pass: 1
      disposition: dismiss
      classification: routine
      disposition_rationale: "Routine because this does not rely on inherited documentation or any citation-backed artifact."
```
